scripts.lint: npm run lint:shell && npm run lint:md
scripts.lint:shell: bash scripts/lint-shell.sh setup.sh bin/gitsummary bin/line-endings.sh lib/install_bin.sh lib/install_packages.sh lib/install_dotfiles.sh lib/install_fonts.sh lib/setup_git.sh dotfiles/.bash_profile dotfiles/.bashrc dotfiles/.profile dotfiles/.shell_common dotfiles/.zshrc dotfiles/.ohmyzshrc

lint-staged.{setup.sh,bin/gitsummary,bin/line-ending: bash scripts/lint-shell.sh setup.sh bin/gitsummary bin/line-endings.sh lib/install_bin.sh lib/install_packages.sh lib/install_dotfiles.sh lib/install_fonts.sh lib/setup_git.sh dotfiles/.bash_profile dotfiles/.bashrc dotfiles/.profile dotfiles/.shell_common dotfiles/.zshrc dotfiles/.ohmyzshrc
